title: immersive creation
description: A modpack for me and my friends. Includes Create, Immersive enginnering, Ad astra, Mekanism and more. Also has some KubeJS code to connect it all together.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4a8b9708c98f0bcbded5c30a38af614ecca2c51.png)

# About
Another create modpack. You might think "what makes this one diffrent?" Well **instead of a progression system that most every modpack has and sometimes forces you to follow, here you have no dedicated progression. You do what you want to not what you have to.** You dont quite like that mod but your buddies do? You can suffer no concequences for not using it (not counting create as a lot of recipies use its machines).
Also *SPACEEEE*. Currently not quite done but the plans are to make it more important for progression as well as make it more plentyful then usual. **The secondary use of this modpack is for servers with intentional confilicts between people/factions. Wars, battles, conflicts all supported by the vast weapon selection the modpack gives.**

### Create
The modpack is based around create and a lot of things **require** it to be made or used. Better put your googles on and grab your wrench couse you are going to need it here.

### Ad Astra
If you want some higher tier equipment from some mods you will have to go on a interplanetery jurney. You never know what you can find on a diffrent planet so better pack well and dont forget anything.

### TaCZ
With great Armaments come great Responsibility to not use it on your own. Realistic Guns. thats kinda it.

### Create big cannons
To lazy to go deal with something? Just shell it from home. Cannons are great if something you want dead is tanky or at a great distance.

### KubeJS
Custom recipies, items and more. Makes everything more connected, unique and possibly also more exciting. Explore the changes and small diffrances in mods that have been done to them and **have fun**!

# Extra Info
**Modpack still in active development and things can change a lot from one version to another.**

Thanks to Yuri_Ivanhellkova and Blockdogo for playtesting and giving ideas.
